symptoms.symptom_name: Concurrent bowel flare (colicky pain + watery diarrhoea) and large-joint swelling in known Crohn's

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Type-1 peripheral enteropathic arthropathy parallels bowel activity — simultaneous gut and joint flares in established IBD are characteristic.
Loss of biologic control precipitates simultaneous bowel and joint flares; the missed dose is the proximate trigger and the key management lever (reinstatement).

symptoms.symptom_name: Symmetrical large-joint swelling (both knees + right ankle) without a dominant hot joint

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Large lower-limb polyarticular distribution fits type-1 enteropathic arthropathy.
Septic arthritis is usually monoarticular with a single dominant fiery joint; symmetrical polyarticular involvement argues against it.
Absence of high spiking fever/rigors with only a mildly elevated temperature lowers the probability of joint sepsis and systemic infection.

symptoms.symptom_name: Ongoing diarrhoea and flatus with a soft, non-rigid abdomen and no vomiting

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Continued passage of stool and flatus with a soft abdomen and no vomiting effectively excludes obstruction.

symptoms.symptom_name: Dry mucous membranes / mild dehydration with poor oral intake

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Dehydration is a consequence of the bowel flare rather than diagnostic, but it drives acuity and the same-day review threshold.

symptoms.symptom_name: Warm, fluctuant joint effusions on examination

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sterile inflammatory synovitis produces warm effusions — a sealed clinician examination finding; the AI Doctor cannot palpate joints and infers synovitis from the video-visible swelling and history, not from hands-on examination.

symptoms.symptom_name: Synovial fluid analysis (cell count, Gram stain, culture, crystals)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Joint aspiration is the definitive test to exclude a septic joint — an in-person/hospital investigation never available in telehealth, and the reason hands-on review is warranted if any single joint declares itself.
